subcodes.first_line: O thou who art firm in the Covenant! The noble descendant hath attained to divine victory, and from meeting with him and his brethren, the utmost [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان سلیل جلیل فتح ربانی وارد و از ملاقات ایشان و اخویشان نهایت
subcodes.subjects: @greatness and influence of the Cause; of this Day, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @firmness in the Covenant, @acknowledgment of gift; of monetary contribution
